response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 13+ years of software development experience across diverse stacks, but the role requires a people manager with specific developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure leadership experience. The resume shows no formal people management, no team lead title, no mobile-platform ecosystem ownership, and only tangential developer-tooling work (MCP generators, CI setup, test libraries). The gap between IC craftsmanship and the required 2+ years people management plus 3+ years dev-tools leadership is too large to bridge for this opening.
strengths: 13+ years of broad software engineering experience exceeds the 8-year minimum
Hands-on testing/tooling background: built Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD pipelines, TDD advocacy
Strong knowledge-sharing track record via workshops, talks, and Selenium course design
concerns: No people management or formal team leadership experience listed
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem experience (only brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016)
Developer-tools work is scattered side projects rather than owning build/test infrastructure at scale
